title: Decorative paper case binding
sources: Douglas Cockerell, Bookbinding and the Care of Books (1901) — case construction and covering
notes: A complete case binding using hand-decorated or marbled paper for the cover. Multi-day project: text block sewn, case made and covered separately, then cased in. Provides the structural backbone for learners to later apply cloth, leather, or vellum. Paper grain direction throughout.
